final_prompt.prompt:
Create a clean, bright, airy e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a feminine beauty brand.

Style/medium: UI/UX mockup, clean modern web design, airy editorial aesthetic with soft feminine touches
Composition: full-width hero section layout, three-column grid (text left / model center / product right), generous white space, 16:9 aspect ratio
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum, soft pink and white color palette with purple floral accents
Scene/backdrop: minimal studio-like background with subtle purple flower accents, floating white rounded stat cards with gold accents showing "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破"
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting, bright and inviting, feminine and aspirational mood
Color palette: soft pink as primary, white as base, purple flowers as accent, gold for stat card highlights
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must be a static UI mockup, not an interactive prototype; all text must be legible at web resolution; layout must be balanced for desktop viewing
Avoid: cluttered layout, dark themes, harsh shadows, generic stock photo aesthetic, low contrast text, deformed hands or face, watermark
